title: scleria parvula subsp. tumanganica
intro: Scleria parvula subsp. tumanganica, also known as Tumangan Sedge, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Scleria parvula subsp. tumanganica include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal purposes, and it is also used in herbal preparations, such as teas and tinctures, to promote overall well-being.
